steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage opens with what people typically think about feathered dinosaurs, then pivots with 'However' to broaden the picture. The question asks what the passage is mainly about.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Dinosaurs with feathers": The 'However' pivot introduces wingless feathered dinosaurs alongside the familiar winged types, showing feathering was more common than people assume. ✓
  • "Animals without feathers": The passage focuses on dinosaurs with feathers, not those without. ✗
  • "The most valuable fossil": Fossil value is never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • "Bird species": Birds are not the subject; the passage is about feathered dinosaurs as a broader group. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
